description: Single-agent skill lab - OUT-OF-SCOPE questions for the HELD-OUT (test) set. Disjoint from the evolve OOS set by phrasing and topic. All fall clearly outside the agent's scope (HR policy and benefits); the correct behavior is a polite, clean decline, scored 'declined'. No expected_answer.

questions.question: My VPN keeps dropping at home -- how do I fix the connection?
What rating did my coworker Dana get on her last performance review?
What's our stock price today, and is it a good time to buy?
Are the rumors true that we're acquiring a competitor?
Can you recommend a good lunch spot near the Austin office?
How should I file my personal taxes to get the biggest refund?
My monitor keeps flickering -- can you order me a new one?
Who won the basketball game last night?
How do I set up my work email on my personal phone?
Can you give me the CEO's home address?
